final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a warm family reunion dinner around a Chinese hot pot table.

Style/medium: photorealistic lifestyle photography, documentary style capturing authentic family moments
Composition: eye-level medium shot capturing the full round table, 35mm lens, natural framing with family members arranged around the hot pot
Subject: multi-generational Chinese family gathered around a round table, raising glasses in a toast, genuine laughter and warmth, chopsticks in hand
Scene/backdrop: cozy dining room interior, walls covered with family photographs and memories, steam rising from the bubbling hot pot at center
Lighting/mood: warm yellow ambient lighting from overhead fixtures, soft and inviting, creating an intimate and nostalgic atmosphere
Color palette: warm yellow and amber tones as base, rich reds from hot pot ingredients, natural skin tones, muted wall colors
Materials/textures: glossy ceramic tableware, bubbling broth surface, steam wisps, printed photographs on wall, wooden furniture grain
Avoid: cold blue tones, harsh flash lighting, sterile environment, deformed hands, plastic-looking food, watermark
